task:
OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/success/page.tsx and /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/commit/page.tsx

In both files, update the nav KO icon from a plain img to a clickable link that clears session and goes home:

Replace:
<img src="/ko_icon_light.svg" alt="KOMMIT" style={{height:'44px', width:'44px'}} />

With:
<a href="/" onClick={() => { sessionStorage.clear(); document.cookie.split(";").forEach(c => { document.cookie = c.replace(/^ +/, "").replace(/=.*/, "=;expires=" + new Date().toUTCString() + ";path=/"); }); }} style={{cursor:'pointer'}}>
  <img src="/ko_icon_light.svg" alt="KOMMIT" style={{height:'44px', width:'44px'}} />
</a>

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/success/page.tsx
       /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/commit/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
KO icon is clickable in both pages
Clicking clears sessionStorage and cookies then goes to /
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: change any other logic
DO NOT: use ast.parse
